meaning: n.(印度哲学和印度教)生命的本源,灵魂,自我
examples: The Atman and so on, they are just theories.
The object of experience exists only to serve the purpose of the Atman.
Ignorance is destroyed by awakening to knowledge of the Atman, until no trace of illusion remains.
Hip-hop mogul Russell Simmons took it one step further by pulling a bottle of his new fragrance, Atman, out of his pocket.
